title: Timeline System Initial Setup
description: Created native system log for tracking n5.os development history with structured timeline entries
author: system

title: Added List Movement Functionality
description: Implemented lists-move command to atomically transfer items between different lists with validation and error handling
author: system

title: Git Change Audit System
description: Added git-check command for auditing staged Git changes to prevent overwrites and data loss during development workflow
author: system

title: Enhanced List Management
description: Upgraded lists-add to v0.2.0 with intelligent auto-assignment and improved parameter handling
author: system

title: Documentation Generation System
description: Created docgen command to automatically generate command catalog and update preferences with validation and schema checking
author: system

title: Knowledge Index System
description: Built comprehensive knowledge indexing system with index.jsonl containing 31,176 entries for fast retrieval and management
author: system

title: Command Registry Architecture
description: Established standardized command.jsonl format with schema validation, enabling extensible command system with metadata, inputs/outputs, and failure mode documentation
author: system

title: N5 Operating System Foundation
description: Initial establishment of n5.os as comprehensive workflow operating system with lists, knowledge management, commands, and modules architecture
author: system

title: Tested Timeline System
description: Successfully tested the new timeline system with viewing and adding capabilities
author: system

title: N5.md File Content Loss - Media System Issue
description: N5.md file was unexpectedly overwritten to empty during timeline system creation. Investigation needed to understand why write operations are causing file content loss. This represents another strike against the outstanding media system stability.
author: system

title: CRITICAL: N5.md Overwrite Incident
description: N5.md was accidentally overwritten to empty content during timeline system implementation. Original content restored from Git history. Need to implement stronger overwrite protection mechanisms.
author: system

title: File Protection System Integration
description: Created file_protector.py with Git-aware overwrite protection for critical N5 OS files. Implements pre-check verification before file modifications and integrates with existing Git governance protections.
author: system

title: Smart File Protection System
description: Implemented architectural file protection that classifies files by their N5 OS role: hard protection for hand-authored files (N5.md, prefs.md), medium protection for curated data (commands.jsonl, lists), and no protection for auto-generated files (commands/*.md, index files)
author: system

title: N5 OS Documentation Library System
description: Created comprehensive dual-structure documentation library with 18 directories (9 system + 9 public) and standardized templates. Includes complete technical documentation for command authoring system and framework for public materials.
author: system

title: Folder Policy Architecture Implementation
description: Implemented folder-specific POLICY.md files as highest-priority governance, overriding global prefs.md unless exempted. Added anchors for system coherence, mandatory checks, and naming convention (POLICY.md). Created policies in N5 root, commands/, lists/, knowledge/, system_docs/. Updated prefs.md and rubric.
author: Zo

title: Timeline System Reorganization
description: Reorganized timeline system to clearly distinguish between N5 OS system development and Careerspan company/life timelines through explicit file naming. Renamed all timeline-related files, commands, and scripts to use 'system-timeline' prefix for N5 OS development and 'careerspan-timeline' prefix for company/life events. Created new commands and scripts for Careerspan timeline management. Updated all integration points including knowledge ingestion and file protection systems.
author: system

title: CRITICAL: N5.md Overwrite Incident (Second Occurrence)
description: N5.md was overwritten to empty (0 bytes) at 04:49 UTC. Recovered from git commit 1526653. This is the second occurrence in 3 weeks (previous: 2025-09-20). Root cause: protection systems exist but are not automatically enforced at tool-call level. File protector.py and policies are documentational but not preventive. See analysis in con_rftEK15ZZ8An0qMc/n5_overwrite_incident_analysis.md
author: system
